author: doll-agent
content:
Triggered by clippy 1.95 lint set:

- 31x needless_borrows_for_generic_args at ferray-ufunc/src/ufunc_methods.rs (lines 460,486,493,500,546,714,721,730,745,751,752,760,761,769,770,781,791,798,804) and ferray-ufunc/src/ufunc_object.rs (lines 214,215,223,231,240,248,249,259,268,276,298,299) — pattern: `arr1(&[...])` should be `arr1([...])`
- 1x inconsistent_digit_grouping at ferray-ufunc/src/ops/bitwise.rs:237:53

All in #[cfg(test)] code, mechanical fix. Discovered during /maintain run on issue #569.
